_comment: Hand-curated roles for firms the automated sources can't reach (own careers sites with no public API or scrapable HTML). These merge into the dashboard AS-IS — the US / undergrad / Summer-2027+ filters are NOT applied, since you've vetted them. Add or remove entries freely, then run a scan. Only company, title, and url are required. NOTE: Jane Street and D. E. Shaw are now scraped automatically, so don't add them here.
